title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
duties: Built and released a Gmail-synced job application tracker (React + Express/Node.js + SQLite) that classifies emails entirely on-device through a hybrid pipeline: a deterministic parser covers the common job boards at zero cost, with a local Ollama LLM as fallback, so no inbox data ever leaves the machine. Smart dedup matching merges records across Gmail and CSV imports using domain probes, company-variant normalization, and ATS requisition numbers, surfacing results in a Kanban board and sortable table where every status change links back to its source Gmail message. Packaged with Electron into a self-updating Windows app (installer and portable, Velopack delta updates) that runs with nothing preinstalled and manages Ollama and its models itself.

Developed a complete responsive full-stack showcase website for a local bakery featuring dynamic product menu, admin dashboard, multilingual support (EN/ZH), location finder, RESTful APIs with Spring Boot + MongoDB, bulk CSV/XLSX/ZIP imports via AWS S3, and production deployment on AWS (Elastic Beanstalk backend, Amplify frontend, CloudFront security) after migrating from React SPA to Next.js for SSR and major performance gains.

Built a full employee attendance solution including a React web utility that generates device-compatible dial URIs and a companion Android app using Kotlin + Jetpack Compose to automate check-in and check-out workflows.
Engineered an autonomous automation tool leveraging image recognition and emulator control libraries to execute repetitive tasks without manual intervention.

title: Software Engineer, Test
duties: Contributed as a key member of an agile scrum team that implemented a SaaS product solution (directbooks.com) for Corporate Bond issuance in the primary markets
Identified critical application bottlenecks by designing and implementing Scala-based load tests with Gatling, then analyzed performance metrics using Grafana and Prometheus.
Improved automated test suite maintainability and readability by refactoring code to reduce duplication, enhancing error reporting mechanisms, and restructuring file organization.
Developed and maintained test suites plus technical documentation in Confluence to support smooth team onboarding.
Collaborated cross-functionally with business leads, product managers, and developers within an agile framework to ensure timely, high-quality software delivery.
Managed test repositories and testing environments using GitLab, leveraging CI/CD pipelines for seamless deployment and updates.
